overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting characters running through an industrial urban district beneath elevated highways. The sequence follows multiple characters as they navigate sidewalks, pass a police checkpoint with NCPD officers, and cross intersections with futuristic traffic. The setting features dystopian industrial architecture with exposed piping, metal structures, and neon signage under overcast skies.

events.description: camera switches to follow character in yellow jacket and black shorts

agents.ego_description: running along the sidewalk beneath the industrial overpass, following a character in a white tank top then switching to follow a character in a yellow jacket

notable_agents.action: character in white tank top and yellow pants running ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel highway structure overhead with support pillars
complex network of large industrial pipes and metal walkways attached to buildings
low concrete wall separating sidewalk from the street
weathered industrial building with metal scaffolding and exhaust vents

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view following a character running along a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway overpass. Industrial piping and weathered factory buildings line the left side while a concrete barrier separates the walkway from the street where sparse traffic passes. The camera follows the running character through this semi-covered industrial corridor.

events.description: transition from sidewalk to running on the asphalt street surface
futuristic vehicles pass by on the left as the camera approaches the police checkpoint

agents.ego_description: running along the street surface toward a police checkpoint, weaving between parked and moving vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car with red accents driving past on the street

entered.detail: futuristic police vehicle with NCPD markings and glowing blue lights parked on the right
industrial building facade with closed metal roll-up shutters

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the sidewalk to the asphalt street, continuing to follow the character in the yellow jacket. An NCPD police car becomes visible ahead on the right, parked in front of a building with metal shutters. Futuristic vehicles pass by on the left as the camera approaches the police checkpoint in this industrial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: police checkpoint with officers and vehicle

events.description: camera slows slightly while passing the police officers and their vehicle
passing the police checkpoint and continuing past the metal shutter building

agents.ego_description: running past the police checkpoint, closely passing the officers and their parked vehicle on the right side

notable_agents.action: three NCPD police officers standing by their vehicle, one with arms crossed

entered.detail: industrial building with corrugated metal roll-up doors and ventilation grilles

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the police checkpoint, passing closely by three NCPD officers standing beside their futuristic police car. The officers appear stationary as the camera continues running past the metal shutter building. The environment remains industrial with the elevated highway structure still visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial intersection with crosswalks and traffic

events.description: camera follows characters turning right at the intersection
waiting for traffic light and crossing the street with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: running through the intersection, following characters in red outfits, navigating around vehicles and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of characters in red athletic outfits running ahead through the intersection

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crossing with yellow and red paving stones at the intersection
futuristic traffic signal showing red light
tall palm tree growing along the street edge
futuristic street sign pole with digital displays

segments.scene_description: The camera follows characters in red outfits through a wide industrial intersection, navigating crosswalks with distinctive colored paving. The scene opens up with more sky visible, showing palm trees and street signage. The camera waits at a traffic light and crosses with moderate pedestrian traffic, continuing through the dystopian industrial district with futuristic vehicles passing by.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic industrial corridor that gradually opens into a wide, bustling urban intersection. It begins by trailing a character along a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway overpass, flanked by weathered factory buildings and industrial piping. As the camera transitions from the walkway to the asphalt street, it follows a character in a yellow jacket toward an NCPD police checkpoint where officers stand beside a futuristic patrol car. The scene then pushes past the stationary officers and metal shutters, maintaining the overhead cover of the highway before the environment expands into a broad intersection. Finally, the camera follows characters in red outfits across colored crosswalks, moving under an open sky dotted with palm trees and street signage amidst the flow of futuristic traffic.
